# home-address negative corpus — should NOT trigger
# Shipping/billing addresses or business addresses without home/personal context
Shipping address: 123 Main Street billing department
Delivery address: 456 Oak Avenue warehouse
Send to: 789 Elm Street shipping center
Return to: 234 Maple Drive returns dept
Office location: 567 Pine Road suite 100
Corporate billing: 890 Cedar Lane accounting
Ship via 123 Birch Court distribution
Business premises: 456 Willow Way LLC
Send package to 789 Spruce Avenue
Billing contact: 234 Poplar Street finance
Registered office 567 Chestnut Road company
Mail to: 890 Walnut Drive PO Box 42
Shipping department: 123 Hickory Lane
Freight: 456 Ash Street dock entrance
Commercial address 789 Magnolia Court business
Delivery instructions: 234 Sycamore Place
Warehouse at 567 Mulberry Lane building B
Dispatch center: 890 Dogwood Drive bay 3
Invoice address: 123 Redbud Court accounts
Business mailing: 456 Sweetgum Avenue floor 5
